- **NU — REDUCE (+5.5%)**: Earnings GATED (2 days, Feb 25), profitable position → Rule 1

- **IONQ — HOLD (-28.1%)**: Recovery mode, earnings GATED (2 days), P/L ≤ -10% → Rule 5
- **UAMY — MONITOR (-7.2%)**: Pre-strategy / pool exhausted, recovery-like treatment, CLEAR earnings → Rule 9
- **USAR — MONITOR (-19.9%)**: Pre-strategy / pool exhausted, CLEAR earnings → recovery monitoring
- **INTC — HOLD (-5.2%)**: Pre-strategy, CLEAR earnings (60 days), bullish technicals offset bearish fundamentals → timed HOLD
- **APLD — MONITOR (-6.6%)**: WITHIN (6 days), CLEAR earnings (46 days), B5 pending → Rule 16
- **CIFR — HOLD (-1.5%)**: GATED (1 day, Feb 24), P/L ≤ 0%, unfilled bullets → Rule 2
- **CLSK — MONITOR (+0.4%)**: WITHIN (4 days), CLEAR earnings (74 days), B2-B4 pending → Rule 16

**Watchlist (7 cards):** AR (ACTIVE), CLF (ACTIVE + FILL ALERT), ACHR (REVIEW — earnings 7 days), SOUN (PAUSE — earnings 3 days + FILL ALERTS), SMCI (ACTIVE + FILL ALERT), LUNR (ACTIVE + FILL ALERT), NNE (ACTIVE + FILL ALERT)

**Critical action today:** NU = REDUCE (earnings in 2 days, lock in +5.5%). CIFR earnings tomorrow — SELL limit at $16.36 had a near-fill (day high $16.18, 1.1% from target).
